title: sorghum cernuum var. globosum
intro: Sorghum cernuum var. globosum, also known as the globe sorghum or globe broom sorghum, is a variety of the sorghum plant, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of sorghum cernuum var. globosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, or used in tinctures and ointments, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
